description: Compute the shared latent time from the dynamical velocity model via scv.tl.latent_time. Per-gene latent times are averaged (weighted by fit_likelihood) into a single pseudotime in obs['latent_time']. Writes the updated .h5ad.
rules: read-only input — writes a new latent_time.h5ad under record_store
requires velocity fit with mode='dynamical' (recover_dynamics must have run)
usage: Set INPUT (velocity .h5ad from a dynamical fit). Output: latent_time.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scvelo installed and a dynamical velocity fit; without scvelo the porter writes a {} placeholder latent_time.h5ad and still passes.
